questions: How do we translate academic findings into practical marketing?
qa.answer: Bridge academic evidence to practice by checking construct alignment, population and context similarity, and mechanism plausibility. Use pre‑registered field tests to validate effects before scale.
implication: Map constructs/metrics to operational KPIs and audiences.
Pilot in representative markets; measure incrementality and spillovers.
Document assumptions and limits; avoid over‑generalizing lab results.
